name: Nyokimon
description: A Seed Digimon whose body surface is covered in transparent tissue. Its real body can be confirmed to be within the transparent skin, and seems to be a variant of Botamon . It is thought that it is perhaps a species of Botamon whose appearance transformed into this herbaceous body. For that reason, it is not only a Plant-species Digimon, but it also has the potential to evolve to Dragon-species Digimon and the like. Its personality is extremely gentle, so it has a timid face. Its offensive ability is nonexistent, so it flings the popping seeds of its " Seed Cracker ", then while the opponent is surprised, it quickly flees.
